---
name: Idea / Plan
about: Propose a new idea, plan, or improvement
title: "[Idea] "
labels: ["idea", "status: inbox"]
---

## Background
Why is this needed? What problem does it solve?

## Goal
What result do you want to achieve?

## Proposal
What is your proposed solution or direction?

## Alternatives
Are there other possible approaches?

## Risks
What could go wrong or become difficult?

## Next Steps
What is the smallest actionable step to move forward?

## Notes
Add any extra context, links, or screenshots here.
